chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. D- 1262 of 2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1.For hearing of Misc No. 5829/2015 2.For hearing of main case. 28.09.2016 Mr. Mohammad Sohail Zafar Bhatti advocate for Respondents. ------------------------- Though petitioner and his counsel both are called absent but a statement is available which was filed on 07.08.2015 in which it is stated that petitioner does not want to press this petition. Similar statement has been filed on 06.09.2016 by the counsel for the petitioner in his own handwriting. The copy of original statement is available on record. Since petitioner does not want to proceed further. The petition in terms of statement is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
